headline: Pfizer (PFE) Upgraded at RBC Capital. Here is Why
summary: With an annual dividend yield of 6.57%, Pfizer Inc. (NYSE:PFE) is included among the 12 High Yield Fortune 500 Stocks to Buy Now. Pfizer Inc. (NYSE:PFE) discovers, develops, manufactures, markets, distributes, and sells biopharmaceutical products in the United States and internationally.
